improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade decisions. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for members."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Get instant AI answers and professional trade support. Start with three free searches.">
improvements.rationale: These tags improve search engine visibility by clearly communicating the product value proposition within optimal character limits. The meta description highlights the free trial offer as a conversion hook. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the homepage is shared on social platforms or messaging apps, increasing click-through rates from referral traffic.

improvements.suggestion:
Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace for your business decisions. Try three searches free, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it serves (trade and business professionals). The subheading highlights three core value props — instant answers, voice chat, and workspace — while clearly stating the free trial offer to reduce friction. The copy is concise, avoids hype, and builds trust by being direct about the trial-to-membership flow.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: After your free searches, you'll be invited to become a GDN AI member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30% with an annual plan. Members unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace for all your trade and business needs.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—what happens when the free trial ends. By clearly explaining the transition and reinforcing the low entry price plus annual savings, it reduces uncertainty and encourages visitors to commit after experiencing Gideon's value.
